caption: A person wearing a black long-sleeved shirt uses their hands to demonstrate a craft product set against a catalog page. The page features the heading "FEELS LIKE FROST SUITE" and displays various winter-themed images. The person holds a clear plastic package labeled "FROSTED FRAMES 5 DIES," which contains several white die-cut shapes. In the first frame, the person points toward a small, ornate white cutout shape. As the sequence progresses, they move their hand to pick up a larger, branch-like white cutout piece from the black background of the product packaging. By the final frame, the person is pointing to the branch-like shape, which is now positioned to the right of the smaller ornate cutout. A "Stampin' Up!" logo is partially visible in the lower-left corner of the frames, and the catalog text lists product details and prices.
